abstract.text: SocialRadioMixtape models a mixtape

The status of this mixtape, i.e. “posted”, “cocreation”, “live”, nil otherwise
SocialRadioCredentials models credentials to access social REST APIs.
The minimum version of the Mix Engine that can play this mixtape
